about.title: About Me
about.description1: Lead engineer and technical leader with 10+ years of experience. Currently leading technology strategy at SuperStartup, where we develop cloud solutions based on AI. Previously worked at AcmeCorp and TechSolutions, where I launched several successful products.
about.description2: Actively sharing knowledge: speaking at conferences, writing a blog. I value minimalism in code and design, focusing on performance and user experience.

items.superproduct: SuperProduct X – development of a high-load platform (100k+ daily users).
items.opensource: OpenSource Library Y – created a popular library (5k stars on GitHub) for data processing.
items.award: Award Z – ranked in top 10 young CTOs according to TechMagazine (2024).
